title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono, a mathematician at Axiom Math, argues that humans cannot compete with AI on knowledge alone and that curiosity and judgment define true intelligence in the age of AI. Drawing from the example of Ramanujan, he advocates for recognizing human genius that systems miss rather than racing to match machine knowledge.
